scripts.sandcastle:cleanup: bd list --json --label-any 'sandcastle:planned,sandcastle:executing,sandcastle:reviewing,sandcastle:executed,sandcastle:merged' | jq -r '.[].id' | xargs -I{} bd update {} --remove-label sandcastle:planned --remove-label sandcastle:executing --remove-label sandcastle:reviewing --remove-label sandcastle:executed --remove-label sandcastle:merged
